'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/feed\/@j900701?__cf_chl_rt_tk=vDH27_Hya.rNs80GEMH5M54prrvdgBfdwFNrvRlTlkY-1773168199-1.0.1.1-rrzpLu3oBL1hzZlYBTXwyBRCds.7PYXEt4bV.b9XIHw"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
